languages.text: "Конечно же, Ваша Светлость. Я отправлю приглашение незамедлительно. Уверен, материальные траты окупятся отношениями с {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Конечно же, Ваша Светлость. Я отправлю приглашение незамедлительно. Уверен, материальные траты окупятся отношениями с {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g}".

languages.text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be recouped in future dealings with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."
languages.original_text: "Конечно же, Ваша Светлость. Я отправлю приглашение незамедлительно. Уверен, материальные траты окупятся отношениями с {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be recouped in future dealings with the Adeptus Mechanicus."
"Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be recouped in future dealings with the Adeptus Mechanicus."
"Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be recouped in future dealings with the Adeptus Mechanicus."

languages.text: 「もちろん、御{mf|殿|殿}様。招待状はすぐに送ります。{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}機械神殿{/g}との今後の取引で、この出費は回収されるでしょう」
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be recouped in future dealings with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."

traits.locale_text: 「もちろん、御{mf|殿|殿}様。招待状はすぐに送ります。機械神殿との今後の取引で、この出費は回収されるでしょう。」
「もちろん、御{mf|殿|殿}様。招待状はすぐに送ります。{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}機械神殿{/g}との今後の取引で、この出費は回収されるでしょう」

languages.text: «Por supuesto, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Enviaré la invitación de inmediato. No me cabe duda de que nuestra inversión se recuperará en futuros tratos con el {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}».
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be recouped in future dealings with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."

traits.locale_text: «Por supuesto, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Enviaré la invitación de inmediato. No me cabe duda de que nuestra inversión se recuperará en futuros tratos con el {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}».

languages.text: “如您所愿，{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}。我将即刻发出邀请。相信有关支出能在日后与{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}机械修会{/g}的合作中得到回报。”
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be recouped in future dealings with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."

traits.locale_text: “如您所愿，{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}。我将即刻发出邀请。相信有关支出能在日后与{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}机械修会{/g}的合作中得到回报。”

languages.text: "Natürlich, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich werde die Einladung umgehend schicken. Ich bin sicher, die angefallenen Kosten werden durch zukünftige Geschäfte mit dem {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} kompensiert."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be recouped in future dealings with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Natürlich, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich werde die Einladung umgehend schicken. Ich bin sicher, die angefallenen Kosten werden durch zukünftige Geschäfte mit dem {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} kompensiert."

languages.text: "Elbette {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Davetiyeyi hemen göndereceğim. Yapılan harcamanın {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} ile gelecekteki anlaşmalarda telafi edileceğinden eminim."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be recouped in future dealings with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Elbette {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Davetiyeyi hemen göndereceğim. Yapılan harcamanın {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} ile gelecekteki anlaşmalarda telafi edileceğinden eminim."

languages.text: « Bien sûr, Votre Seigneurie. Je vais immédiatement lui faire parvenir votre invitation. Nous récupérerons certainement les dépenses engagées lors de futures transactions avec l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. »
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will send the invitation immediately. I'm sure the incurred expenditure will be recouped in future dealings with the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}."

traits.locale_text: « Bien sûr, Votre Seigneurie. Je vais immédiatement lui faire parvenir votre invitation. Nous récupérerons certainement les dépenses engagées lors de futures transactions avec l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. »
